he saw action in Viet Nam

meanings.definition: have firsthand knowledge of states, situations, emotions, or sensations
examples: I have lived a kind of hell when I was a drug addict
The holocaust survivors have lived a nightmare

meanings.definition: go through (mental or physical states or experiences)
undergo an emotional sensation or be in a particular state of mind

examples: The stocks had a fast run-up

meanings.definition: having experience; having knowledge or skill from observation or participation
